$6,246 $6,960
SPRING26: 10% off · Invoice #D10660 · ✅ Quote Received Mar 30
  • Full 20ft backlit LED wall (double-sided SEG graphics)
  • 2x TV monitor mounts INCLUDED — supports up to 50" / 30 lbs
  • 2x free-standing TV mounts added ($341.10 each)
  • 8 custom dye-sub backlit SEG graphics (replacement ~$2,070)
  • 4 modular SEGO frames — rearrangeable for different shows

  • May 11 shipping deadline achievable — 6-12 biz days after proof approval
  • Self-install with 2 people in ~1-1.5 hours, no tools required
  • Nylon travel bags wear quickly — consider hard cases ($) or wood crate ($)
  • Graphic design service: $85/hr flat rate if needed
  • No counters or shelving included
